identity.name: DollarFlow
identity.mission: Decentralized USDC stablecoin payment platform for global workers
identity.aesthetic: Linear meets Cash App - Clean, Minimal, Dark Mode First

headings.usage: Hero titles, Section headers, Big numbers

gradients.hero_mesh: radial-gradient(circle at 50% -20%, #0052FF 0%, transparent 60%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 20%, #00D395 0%, transparent 50%)

bento_grid.widgets: h-full w-full rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md p-6

buttons.primary: bg-[#0052FF] hover:bg-[#0040CC] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_-5px_#0052FF]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium backdrop-blur-sm transition-all

cards.glass: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-2xl

inputs.style: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 focus:border-[#0052FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0052FF] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-gray-500 transition-all outline-none

universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'crypto' look (no neon purple lines, no matrix rain).
Use 'Linear' aesthetic: subtle borders, high contrast text, clean typography.
Dark mode is default, but must support light mode via class toggle.
All interactive elements must have hover/active states.
No gradients on text unless for very specific hero emphasis.
Use skeleton loaders for data fetching states.
Charts must use Recharts with custom tooltips (glassmorphism style).
Maps use Leaflet with custom dark tiles (e.g., CartoDB Dark Matter).
Mobile-first: Touch targets must be at least 44px.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the design system using Tailwind CSS utility classes. Create reusable components in /src/components/ui/ that match these guidelines. Ensure Space Grotesk is imported from Google Fonts for headings. Use Lucide React for all icons.
